title: BETWEEN issue in view
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c0 INTEGER, c1 VARCHAR(255), c2 FLOAT);
INSERT INTO t1(c0, c1, c2) VALUES(1, 'A', 1.5);
INSERT INTO t1(c0, c1, c2) VALUES(2, 'B', NULL);
CREATE VIEW v3 AS SELECT c1, c2 FROM t1 WHERE c0 >= 1 AND c0 <= 2;
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN c2 IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM v3 WHERE c1 >= 'A' AND c1 <= 'B';
key_bug_features: SUM() miscalculates with BETWEEN condition in view
